# Support

For now, support is best-effort while the project is prepared for public release.

## Before asking for help

Check:

- [使い方 / Usage](../docs/usage.md)

## Useful details to include

- Operating system
- Browser and version
- Whether you used the local server or `file://`
- Console errors, if any
- Steps to reproduce
- Whether camera, microphone, OBS mode, or `.purupuru` import/export is involved

Remove private information and private character assets before sharing logs or screenshots.
